label: Instacart
description: Connect to Instacart Connect to manage retail catalog, orders, and fulfillment through the Instacart partner API.

form.title: Connect Instacart
form.subtitle: Authenticate with your Instacart Connect API key and retailer ID issued by your Instacart partner onboarding team.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste the API key and retailer ID issued by your Instacart Connect partner team. This is the only supported auth path — Instacart Connect is not self-serve.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with your Instacart Connect API Key

Instacart Connect is a partner-only program. Credentials are issued by Instacart's onboarding team during your integration engagement — there is no self-serve portal to generate them.

### Prerequisites

- An active Instacart Connect partnership agreement.
- Completed onboarding with your Instacart partner solutions engineer.

### Steps

1. Reach out to your Instacart Connect partner contact or solutions engineer if you have not already received credentials.
2. Instacart will provide two values via a secure channel:
   - **API Key** — a long secret token used to authenticate all API requests.
   - **Retailer ID** — a numeric or string identifier scoping requests to your retail account.
3. Copy the **API Key** and paste it into the **API Key** field below.
4. Copy the **Retailer ID** and paste it into the **Retailer ID** field below.
5. Select the **Environment** that matches the credentials provided (Sandbox for testing, Production for live data).
6. Click **Submit** to save the connection.

### Notes

- Sandbox and Production environments use separate credentials — do not mix them.
- If your API key is revoked or rotated by Instacart, you must paste the new key and re-save the connector.
- For access issues, contact [Instacart Connect support](https://www.instacart.com/company/instacart-connect/) through your partner account.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: The secret API key issued by your Instacart Connect partner onboarding team.

fields.name: retailer_id
fields.label: Retailer ID
fields.description: Your Instacart Connect retailer identifier, provided by your Instacart partner team.

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment
fields.description: Select Sandbox to test against non-live data, or Production for real fulfillment operations.
